props.ChoiceText: Another hunter made the woods feel smaller, meaner, and more personal than before.
props.ChoiceBio: Trapline rivalry made the wilderness feel narrower and more dangerous.

0.TransitionText: Because trapline rivalry made the wilderness feel narrower and more dangerous, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because trapline rivalry made the wilderness feel narrower and more dangerous, woodcraft and necessity slid easily into poaching, smuggling, and criminal work.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.
